utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yes ! ! Yes ! Yes ! Yes ! ! That is my Dad , that is Frank ! Yeah ! I am sorry I am getting all flingy .

emotion_cause.span: 1_That is my Dad , that is Frank !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: Take it easy ... if you want , there is cookies on the counter , or , or ... sangria ! I can make sangria !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No ... no , sorry . Cookies are good , thanks .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , so , umm , anyway umm , I have been , I have been looking for my Father , and umm , have you heard from him , or seen him ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: Oh no , I ... I am sorry , I guess we lost track of everybody after high school .

emotion_cause.span: 6_we lost track of everybody after high school .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , okay . Well , so tell me everything about my parents . Everything .

emotion_cause.span: 7_tell me everything about my parents . Everything .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: Ohh , well . You know we were always together , in fact the other kids had a nickname for the three of us .

emotion_cause.span: 8_the other kids had a nickname for the three of us .
12_I ... I heard about what happened , that must have been just terrible for you , losing your mother that way .

utterances.text: Ohh , you know I ... I heard about what happened , that must have been just terrible for you , losing your mother that way .
